title: The World's Finest Assassin Gets Reincarnated in Another World as an Aristocrat
sourceNotes: 12-ep S1 anime (2021) adapts the manga of Tougetsu Hamada (orig. light novel by Rui Tsukiyo). The finale (ep 12) ends at manga ch 23 plus the epilogue, covering roughly LN vols 1-3. Manga ongoing (current ch ~43 / 9 vols, English via MangaDex mid-2026; AniList lists chapters as null). Per-episode chapter boundaries are approximate beyond the confirmed ep-12 = ch-23 endpoint, so groupings are coarse. Resume reading at ch 24.

mappings.arc: Reincarnation & Childhood Training (Tuatha Dé arts, magic, Dia)
The Hero Subjugation (Setanta & the God Spear; incl. epilogue)
